message:
fix: omit undefined, function, and symbol properties from js_to_json object serialization

Add a guard in js_to_json_inner's object property iteration loop to skip
values that are undefined, functions, or symbols before inserting them into
the JSON map. This aligns with the ECMAScript JSON.stringify specification
which omits these three non-serializable value types when serializing object
properties. Without this fix, these values would either cause errors or
produce incorrect JSON output since undefined/function/symbol have no JSON
representation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
